title: Assistant Store Manager - Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Ghaziabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd!
